per_iteration.changes: Replaced verbose 573-line SKILL.md (containing irrelevant SQL, visualization, charting content) with focused 95-line version. Key changes: (1) removed SQL query patterns, visualization guides, report templates, statistical analysis sections; (2) added explicit guidance on counting issues on unique rows before dedup; (3) emphasized per-row revenue computation (amount × quantity) before aggregation; (4) added specific date format examples with conversion patterns; (5) clarified invalid email detection (missing TLD). Removed unused files: scripts/data-init.sh, scripts/query.sh, WA_Fn-UseC_-Telco-Customer-Churn.csv.
Verification run — no changes needed. Confirmed consistent 100/100 scores on both tasks.
